unit.note: F0 verification: shipwright-run 229 + shared/tests 3678 (16 skipped); ruff clean; leak-guard f0 ALLOW

surface_verification.justification: SS1 is a Python schema + orchestrator-package scaffold: it adds an optional run_config 'mode' field and a new single_session/ contract package (result contract + loop-state persistence). No web/UI/API surface, no server, no client code. The 'mode' field is additive and ignored by the current WebUI (phase_tasks message contract unchanged), so the Backend-affects-Frontend rule does not apply; WebUI single-session rendering is a separate paired track (per Spec/pipeline-as-campaign-convergence.md). Verification is the full F0 pytest suite (schema round-trip, mode back-compat, contract + loop-state round-trips) + ruff.

behaviors.behavior: create_config writes an additive run_config 'mode' (multi_session default | single_session) to disk
A mode-less legacy config loads unchanged and reads as multi_session; an unknown value coerces to multi_session (back-compat)
write-config --mode accepts the two modes, defaults to multi_session, and rejects an unknown value; create_config raises on invalid mode
The schema declares 'mode' as OPTIONAL (not in required) with enum + default multi_session, matching RUN_MODES
/shipwright-run SKILL.md documents both modes, marks multi_session default, threads --mode in Step 4, offers Change mode, and stays within the 400-line runtime-prompt budget

The phase-runner result contract validates the shape (required keys, ok/reason coupling, phase enum, 2000-char summary ceiling, relative-repo-path artifacts) and the builder refuses invalid results without silent truncation
VALID_PHASES stays in lockstep with the schema Phase enum (both-direction drift guard)
Loop-state init/save/load round-trips atomically to .shipwright/run_loop_state.json (distinct from the campaign loop_state.json); the mutators are pure and status is validated

Lifecycle-reuse contract: every completion entrypoint resolves in phase_task_lifecycle; the single_session package calls no mutator/run_config-writer (code-only AST scan); loop-state ops leave run_config byte-identical and create none
